scope_note: GNN Spectral Gain Cert family [98]: derives the curvature gain from sigma_max(W) — the spectral norm of the GNN weight matrix — via power iteration on W^T W. Gain is a native structural object (determined by learned weights), not a free witness. Pins H_QA substrate formula, update rule p_after = p_before - lr*sigma_max*H_QA*grad, and kappa = 1 - |1 - lr*sigma_max*H_QA|.
